question: Does the tutorial follow a clear step-by-step format with distinct, numbered, or clearly separated stages as requested?
Does the tutorial explicitly include instructions for designing all three required modules: Current Weather, 7-day Forecast, and Air Quality?
Does the generated output include a screenshot or image at each major stage of the design process as specifically requested?
Does the tutorial specifically utilize Figma as the design tool, referencing its actual interface elements and workflow?
Does the workflow follow a logical professional progression (e.g., Setup → Wireframe → Components/Styling → Final Polish)?
Do the text instructions explicitly reference specific Figma features (e.g., Frames, Auto Layout, Components, or Plugins) rather than generic design theory?
Does the text provide actionable steps for creating the specific data visualizations required (e.g., charts, bars, or indicators for Air Quality)?
Do the generated images visually resemble the Figma user interface (e.g., showing the canvas, toolbar, properties panel, or layers panel)?
Does the final product image clearly visualize all three modules (Current Weather, 7-day Forecast, Air Quality) integrated into the interface?
Is the text within the generated UI mockups (e.g., temperature numbers, day names, AQI values) legible and free from severe gibberish?
Are the images free from significant AI artifacts, such as distorted UI elements, warped icons, or incoherent text rendering?
Does each generated image directly correspond to and illustrate the specific design step described in the adjacent text?
When the text describes the 7-day forecast module, does the corresponding image show a list or row of daily weather entries?
When the text describes the Air Quality module, does the corresponding image show relevant AQI indicators (e.g., index number, color scale, or gauge)?
Does the weather app design mockup maintain a consistent visual style (layout structure, spacing, theme) across all progression images?
Are the images placed logically immediately after or alongside the text instructions they are meant to illustrate?
Do the images show a clear visual progression in fidelity, evolving from basic wireframes/sketches to a fully polished design?
